feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Did Elmer and Bugs ever…you know…?
entry.content: Did Elmer and Bugs ever…you know…?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Bitlocker - YellowKey
entry.content: Is your system safe from this windows exploit? They are using recovery to bypass your bitlocker encryption.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: NEW GEARS COSTS MORE THAN CONCORD
entry.content: >needs to sell over 8m copies at FULL PRICE just to break even, probably closer to 10-12m after marketing >only releasing on one console >day one on gamepass >not releasing on PS5 >very low wishlist ranking on steam This shit is going to flop like a turd in the toilet bowl. GOODBYE COALITION

entry.content: What the hell??? Why aren't Euros buying their own cars??? I'd kill for a BMW!

entry.content: I mean, I should give her all the pictos?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: https://mastodon.social/@bongo20201 /116742073362454225 RIP Kuketz. Mike Kuketz—…
entry.content: https://mastodon.social/@bongo20201 /116742073362454225 RIP Kuketz. Mike Kuketz—the well-known data privacy expert and ally of the GrapheneOS developer team—has been exposed: for years, his forum had been collecting users' IP addresses and browser identifiers. So much for data privacy.

entry.content: It's been a long time since I've been actually hyped for a game release.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why doesn't any other manufacturer make parts diagrams and numbers available to anyone?
entry.content: Surely manufacturers would rake in money if all part diagrams and numbers with prices were available to everyone, as anyone can just purchase the OEM Part direct instead? This is especially useful for bolts when replacing rusted out bolts AFAIK only JLR allow this for their cars https://parts.jaguarlandroverclassi c.com/

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Black Stalin: You Ask for It [Kalico, 1984] Heir to the voluble wit of calypso t…
entry.content: Black Stalin: You Ask for It [Kalico, 1984] Heir to the voluble wit of calypso tradition, Leroy Calliste is droller than any Jamaican Rasta you can think of whether he's being dragged kicking and jamming into soca clichés or talking back to a vocoder that won't shut up about "better days are coming." With its Cuban horns and displaced steel drums, the music has its own witty take on the tradition. And if I don't understand every topical reference, maybe it's just as well--any kind of Rasta going

entry.title: /o/ Auto: how stupid and retarded would i be for buying a civic type r brand new. these th…
entry.content: how stupid and retarded would i be for buying a civic type r brand new. these things are nearly 50k and some dealerjews are charging almost 60k. i got the money and could buy the thing for cash but postnut clarity will make me probably regret it. a part of me wants to keep my current shitbox going for a few more years and just dump more money into the stockmarket but the teenager in me really wants a brand new type r. idk, if this posts gets dubs i'll go out and get one by the end of this year.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Google is ruining chromium, and therefore also: Edge, Opera, Brave and more
entry.content: Google is ruining chromium, and therefore also: Edge, Opera, Brave and more

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Stinger
entry.content: Tell me why you have not bought one yet. >$35k USD >Sub 5s 0-60/100 >Reliable af twin turbo 3.3L V6 engine >Comfy leather interior with all the trimmings (cooled seats, etc) >Not retardedly over-safety focused like newer kias >5 seater >Shitload of cargo space in boot >Can get down to 8L/100km (29mpg) on highway There is nothing else you need. It's fast, it's practical, it's reliable.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >I hate smart people so frickin' much....They make my life hell and shatter my e…
entry.content: >I hate smart people so frickin' much....They make my life hell and shatter my ego whenever I see them actually accomplishing something...I wanna keep my ego...WAAAAAHHHH!!!!! >Wait, AI! OH MY GOD YES! ACCELERATE ACCELERATE ACCELERATE! DESTROY THOSE STUPID SMARTIES! I HATE THEM SO MUCH! NOW WE CAN ALL BE DUMB SUBSERVIENT GOYCATTLE!

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Mini Mk7
entry.content: Might be getting one soon as my first car from a relative, what am I in for? I heard they rust pretty bad but they have multi-point fuel injection which is pretty neat for a classic Mini.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: NUCLEAR HAPPENING
entry.content: BMW’s new iX3 beat out the competition, driving 485 miles on a single charge, making it the longest-range EV during Motor and NAF’s summer range test. https://electrek.co/2026/06/04/bmws -new-ix3-drove-485-miles-longest-ra nge-ev-naf-test/

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Anyone ever replace discs and calipers? How much did it cost? Bought a 15 year o…
entry.content: Anyone ever replace discs and calipers? How much did it cost? Bought a 15 year old car used and the exterior is fine except for the brakes; they look like picrel. They work fine and don't squeak, but are ugly as fuck. If decent rims were cheaper let me know since I would be fine with just hiding it.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: What does it mean when a car magazine describes a front suspension as "control a…
entry.content: What does it mean when a car magazine describes a front suspension as "control arms" vs mcpherson struts vs double wishbones? I feel like a lot of this is imprecise language but are having control arms and struts mutually exclusive? I find the terminology confusing.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Should I buy Porsche 928 for 7k USD?
entry.content: 1981 model. It runs and drives and is registered. Timing belt water pump done in 2019. No logbooks. Hong Kong Import allegedly. Beige on brown. Dashboard has seen better days, otherwise seems ok. Talk me out of it anons. I make decent money but I'm not loaded. I am used to wrenching on old BMWs but haven't owned porsh b4.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Is it worth it to take a CDL course just for the sake of it? I don't want to be …
entry.content: Is it worth it to take a CDL course just for the sake of it? I don't want to be a truck driver but I enjoy learning new things just for the sake of it. It's about 4K for a course at the local community college.

entry.title: /news/ News: IF ONLY APRIL 30 2011 HOMO HUSSEIN CORRESPONDENCE DINNER DIDN'T HAPPEN THEN NO DEMENTED DONALD TODAY
entry.content: https://www.newsweek.com/obama-appo inted-judge-sides-with-trump-admin- on-ufc-fight-12067121 Obama-Appointed Judge Sides With Trump Admin on UFC Fight Multiple news outlets have suggested that President Obama's mocking of Donald Trump at the 2011 White House Correspondents' Dinner provoked him to run for office. Trump tells a different story. Regardless, President Trump has declined to go to this year's dinner. https://www.cnn.com/videos/cnnmoney /2017/04/28/obama-roast-trump-corre spondents-di

entry.title: /news/ News: Federal authorities investigate giant ‘8647’ markings on National Mall
entry.content: https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/tr ump-administration/federal-authorit ies-investigate-giant-8647-markings -national-mall-rcna349717 Giant markings of the numbers 8647 appeared Thursday on the National Mall in Washington, prompting an investigation by federal authorities and claims of “political violence” by the White House. An Interior Department spokesperson called the incident “deranged” vandalism that “will not be tolerated.” “Any threat against the President is taken very seriously by the

entry.title: /news/ News: US lawmakers seek $750 million for Ukraine, move to adopt 'Department of War' rebrand
entry.content: https://www.reuters.com/business/ae rospace-defense/us-lawmakers-seek-7 50-mln-ukraine-rename-pentagon-depa rtment-war-defense-bill-2026-06-11/ WASHINGTON, June 11 (Reuters) - The U.S. Senate Armed Services Committee on Thursday said it voted to extend U.S. security assistance for Ukraine and increase authorized funding to $750 million, the latest pushback from Congress against the Trump administration's pullback on aid for Kyiv as it fights a Russian invasion. The Republican-majority panel said

Grok still hosting sexualized deepfakes of famous women. > https://www.wired.com/story/grok-is -still-hosting-sexualized-deepfakes -of-famous-women/ SpaceX going to trick Elon Musk into becoming even richer! > https://www.nytimes.com/2026/06/11/ technology/spacex-ipo-price.html?un locked_article_code=1.pVA.3_UG.ZXLV s1-V4UYd∣=url-share Musk a (paper) Trillionaire… > https://www.washingtonpost.com/tech nology/2026/06/11/elon-musk-is-worl ds-first-trillion

entry.title: /news/ News: 'Crock Of Shit': Grand Jury Calls Out Trump's DOJ Lawfare on US Citizens
entry.content: >Recently released grand jury transcripts show the extreme lengths federal prosecutors went to in order to secure indictments against the "Broadview Six" protesters. https://www.huffpost.com/entry/gran d-jury-transcripts-show-skepticism- broadview-six_n_6a29e4f2e4b0a99062f b6929 On her second attempt to secure an indictment against a group of protesters who would come to be known as the “Broadview Six,” Assistant U.S. Attorney Sheri Mecklenburg kicked out a grand juror who described the case as

entry.title: /news/ News: LEFTISTS WON asylum migrant in Belfast causes grevious injuries to local after beheading attempt
entry.content: https://nypost.com/2026/06/10/world -news/belfast-stabbing-victim-lost- eye-during-attempted-beheading-as-s udanese-suspect-is-idd/ Barbaric video footage showed Ogilvie being pinned under the knifeman — with a horrified witness heard crying, “He’s trying to cut his head off. He’s slicing his head off.” Ogilvie suffered serious injuries to his right eye and had deep slash wounds in his head, face and back, the hearing in Belfast was told.

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump says ‘I love the inflation’ after consumer price index hits 3-year high
entry.content: https://www.cnbc.com/2026/06/10/tru mp-inflation-cpi-iran-oil.html President Donald Trump on Wednesday said, “I love the inflation” after being asked if he was concerned about new consumer price index data that showed the annual inflation rate at 4.2%, a three-year high. Trump, speaking with reporters in the Oval Office, also predicted that inflation is “going to come down like a rock” after the United States’ war against Iran is over. The president linked that prediction to a confusing statemen

entry.title: /news/ News: Top Pentagon Official Admits Boat Strike May Have Killed Victims of Human Trafficking
entry.content: > If this boat was running drugs, why was it loaded with so many people? https://archive.is/2026.06.10-11473 8/https://theintercept.com/2026/06/ 10/trump-boat-strikes-human-traffic king-victims/

entry.title: /news/ News: Karmelo Anthony found guilty of murder.
entry.content: https://www.cbsnews.com/texas/news/ karmelo-anthony-trial-verdict-austi n-metcalf-frisco-track-meet-stabbin g/ A Collin County jury found Karmelo Anthony guilty of murder in the fatal stabbing of 17-year-old Austin Metcalf during a Frisco ISD track meet, bringing an end to a closely watched trial that drew national attention and sparked debate over self-defense, race and school safety. Anthony, now 19, had been charged in the April 2, 2025, killing of Metcalf at Kuykendall Stadium in Frisco. Pro

entry.title: /vip/ VIP: /vip/ is an invalid board, because it officially uses reddit spacing

entry.title: /vip/ VIP: ᠏
/vip/ VIP: Reading responses?
entry.content: Are you reading responses to what you post? I came here from Reddit to have true freedom from karma. But I think that the responses are kinda like upvotes and downvotes. So in order to be myself and not bow down to the opinion of others, I should just post and move on!
